name: logistics-app
description: COMP70006 Assessment 2 — Logistics Shipment Tracking & Delivery Management System

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,auth,shipments,routes,notifications,web -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan,white "npm:dev -w gateway" "npm:dev -w auth-service" "npm:dev -w shipments-service" "npm:dev -w routes-service" "npm:dev -w notifications-service" "npm:dev -w web"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -n gateway,auth,shipments,routes,notifications -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm:dev -w gateway" "npm:dev -w auth-service" "npm:dev -w shipments-service" "npm:dev -w routes-service" "npm:dev -w notifications-service"
